index.title: Punaoa Fa'aliliu
index.description: Resource Translator tatalaina masini-fa'aliliuina talosaga toso mo au punaoa faila i so'o se repo, i so'o se fa'atulagaga - fa'amalosia e Azure AI Translator.
index.socialTitle: Resource Translator — faaliliuina faila punaoa otometi
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.lede: E tatalaina e le Resource Translator talosaga fa'aliliuina masini mo au faila punaoa e fa'aaoga ai le Azure AI Translator e ala i le SDK aloaia — leai se auaunaga fa'aopoopo, na'o se fa'agaioiga.
index.workflowTitle: O le faaliliuga o se galuega, ae le o se galuega.
index.workflowBody: Tu'u le gaioiga i lau CI o lo'o i ai, fa'asino i le Azure AI Translator, ma fa'atagaina lau repo e tautala i gagana uma e te taula'i i ai.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Fa'apa'u se faila {configPath} mo aofia ai globs, glossaries, ma vaega o le Custom Translator.

glossary.title: Glossary-iloa
glossary.body: Loka igoa igoa ma oloa tuutuuga ma atamai upu-tuaoi regex e taulimaina {cpp}, {dotnet}, ma uo.

dryRun.title: Fa'amamago-tamo'e + vaivai-toilalo
dryRun.body: Muai vaai faaliliuga e aunoa ma le tusiaina o faila, po o le faaalia o mea sese uma o se lapataiga ao e iterate.

outputs.title: PR-faauo galuega faatino
outputs.body: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, ma {hasNewTranslations} slot sa'o i le fausiaina-toso-talosaga.

sdk.title: Aloaia Azure SDK
sdk.body: Fausia i luga o {azureSdk} + {corePipeline} — otometi toe taumafai i {statusCodes}, leai se HTTP. {esbuild}-fusi, suegatusi-mama.

workflowPreview.body: Tolu mea lilo, fa laina, ma o lau repo e tele gagana i le isi tulei.

cta.title: Sauni e fa'apipi'i i luga o le autopilot?
cta.body: Tasi le Azure AI Translator key, tasi le faila o le workflow. O le Resource Translator e taulimaina le vaega o totoe.

getting-started.title: Amata
getting-started.lede: Fa'aopopo se faila fa'asologa, fa'asino i lau Azure AI Translator credentials, ma o le gaioiga o le a fa'ata'ita'ia le repo mo punaoa punaoa ma fa'asalalau uso ua fa'aliliuina.

provision.title: Provision an Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Fausia se Azure AI Translator punaoa i le Azure portal, ona teu lea o mea nei e pei o GitHub repository secrets ina ia mafai ai e le workflow ona faitau i latou:
provision.key: O le ki o le saofaga mo le punaoa.
provision.endpoint: O le URL o le i'uga fa'aitulagi.
provision.region: O le itulagi Azure o le punaoa.

resource.title: Faia se faila punaoa punaoa
resource.body: O faila o punaoa e faaaoga ai le tauaofiaga {namingConvention}. Mo se fa'ata'ita'iga, {sourceFile} avea ma {frFile}, {deFile}, ma isi mea pe a mae'a se tamo'e.

output.title: Siaki le galuega faatino
output.body: O le taimi lava e mae'a ai le galuega, o le gaioiga e fa'aalia ai galuega faatino e tolu e mafai ona e uaea i totonu o se fa'amatalaga PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, ma {hasNewTranslations}. E tusia ai foi se aotelega o le Markdown i le itulau o galuega e ala i {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Laasaga e sosoo ai
nextSteps.recipes: Tagai fua mo monorepos, glossaries masani, ma vaega o Custom Translator.

configuration.title: Fa'atulagaina
configuration.heroTitle: Fa'atulagaina o le fale teu oloa
configuration.lede: Fa'ailoa le fa'aletonu tasi i le faila config repository ma fa'atagaina galuega uma e mautofi i latou. E manumalo i taimi uma le faatinoga pe a tuuina atu uma e lua.
configuration.intro: Fa'afeso'ota'i le auala i le fa'amaumauga {configPath} pe afai e te mana'omia se nofoaga e le fa'aletonu.

fields.sourceLocale: Toe fo'i i le {sourceLocale} fa'amaumauga pe a le fa'aaogaina. Fa'apea foi ona tu'uina atu i le Fa'aliliu Upu e pei o {fromLocale} o lea e le mafai ai ona fa'ailoa mai ni manoa pu'upu'u.
fields.toLocales: A le o se fa'ata'ita'iga po'o se koma-vavae'ese manoa.
fields.includeExclude: Glob mamanu iloiloina e faasaga i auala atoatoa ma workspace-relatif.
fields.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} vaega — lau alamanuia / vaega knob (faaletulafono, faafomai, maketiina leo, ma isi). Auina atu e pei o {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Fa'aletonu i le {plain}. Fa'aaoga {html} pe a fai o au punaoa o lo'o i ai ni vaega HTML moni.
fields.profanityAction: E fa'apefea ona fa'aliliuina upu masoa i le fa'aliliuga?
fields.profanityMarker: E na o le taua pe a {profanityAction} {marked}.
fields.allowFallback: Seti i le {false} e toilalo le faaliliuga pe afai e leai se {categoryId} o le faaaogaina mo se nofoaga autu nai lo le toe pa'u i tua i le faataitaiga lautele.
fields.apiVersion: Translator REST API version. Fa'aletonu i le {version}.
fields.maxRetries: Fa'ateleina taumafaiga toe taumafai i luga o tali HTTP le tumau ({statusCodes}). E le mafai ona {defaultRetries}. O le aofa'i o vala'au HTTP i le talosaga e {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Cap (ms) i luga o so'o se moe e tasi. Fa'aletonu i le {defaultBackoff}. O le ulutala {retryAfter} a Azure e fa'aaloalo tonu lava pe a i ai; a leai, o lo'o fa'aaogaina le fa'amalosia o le fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i, fa'atapula'aina i lenei fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Fa'aletonu i le {true}. A i ai, o fa'ailoga e pei o le {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} ma HTML fa'alapotopotoga e suia i fa'ailoga sentinel a'o le'i fa'aliliuina ma toe fa'afo'i mulimuli ane. Fa'aleaogaina pe a fai o le punavai o lo'o i ai ni fa'ata'ita'iga fa'apitoa.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Fa'aopopo fa'ata'ita'iga regex (e aunoa ma le fa'atapula'aina) fa'aopopo i le seti placeholder faaletonu, mo se fa'ata'ita'iga {angleToken} mo le syntax fa'ailoga masani. E le amana'iaina regexes le aoga.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Glob mamanu fetaui ma parser-tulaga ki (JSON togitogi auala, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF iunite {xliffId}, INI / restext ki). O ki e fetaui ma le a pa'u i lalo mai le talosaga ma pasi atu faatasi ai ma lo latou taua o le punavai ua faasaoina.

steps.actionInputs: O le gaioiga e faitau ai fa'amatalaga manino mai le fa'agaioiga.
steps.config: E utaina le YAML config mai {configPath}.
steps.precedence: Mo fanua uma e fefa'asoaa'i, o le sao e manumalo; A leai, o le a fa'aaogaina le fa'aaogaina o le YAML.
steps.validation: O tulaga faatauaina ua tuufaatasia ua faamaonia. O le fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i (mo se fa'ata'ita'iga, {invalidEnum}) e mafua ai le vave fa'aletonu o le gaioiga ma se fe'au manino.

tone.heading: Tone ma alamanuia, i faaupuga manino
tone.body: O le Azure AI Translator v3 API e leai se tone knob e tasi. E lua fa'ata'ita'iga e tu'ufa'atasia e tu'uina atu ia te oe le tele o le fa'atonutonu tutusa:
tone.industryBody: fa'aaoga {categoryId} e fa'asino ai i se vaega o le Azure {customTranslatorLink} a'oa'oina i luga o lau oe lava corpus — fa'aletulafono, fa'apitoa, fa'afoma'i, maketiina, po'o se isi lava mea. O le malosi lea mo le leo, leo o le ituaiga, ma le gagana.
tone.surfaceBody: Fa'aaoga le {glossaryLink} e loka ai igoa ma oloa fa'aupuga verbatim, ma fa'aaoga {profanityAction} e fufulu ai upu masoa pe a fa'atatau i le localization mo le au maimoa laiti.

inputs.title: Fa'amatalaga ma galuega faatino
inputs.lede: O fa'amatalaga uma e taliaina foi i totonu o le faila config repo filifiliga. A mae'a ona fa'atulagaina uma e lua, o le a manumalo le sao o le gaioiga.
inputs.configurationIntro: Va'ai {configurationLink} mo le fa'asologa o le YAML ma le utaina o le fa'atonuga.

items.sourceLocale: Punaoa nofoaga (eg {en}) fa'aaogaina e su'e ai punaoa faila e pei o {sourceGlob}. Na auina atu foi i le faaliliu upu e pei o {fromLocale}.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Pasi e ala i {secrets}.

items.region: Itulagi o punaoa faaliliu (aveese mo punaoa o le lalolagi).
items.toLocales: Nofoaga e fa'aliliuina ai. Talia se JSON array ({jsonArray}) po'o se koma-vavae'ese tulaga faatauaina.
items.include: Newline-vavae'ese glob mamanu; E na'o fa'amaumauga fa'amaumauga e mafai ona fa'aliliuina.
items.exclude: Newline-vavae'ese glob mamanu; E faamisi faila tutusa (faaaoga pe a uma ona aofia ai).
items.configPath: Ala i le faila config YAML (e fa'atatau i le a'a o le workspace).
items.dryRun: Pe a {true}, tamoe faaliliuga ma auina atu aotelega ae aua le tusia faila.
items.failOnError: Pe a {true}, o mea sese e le'i mafaufauina e le mafai ona faia; Pe a {false}, o mea sese o ni lapataiga.

translatorInputs.heading: Talosaga a le tagata faaliliu sao
translatorInputs.intro: O nei fa'afanua sa'o i luga o Azure AI Translator v3 fesili fa'ata'ita'iga. O mea uma e filifilia; O le faaletonu o le Faaliliu e faatatau pe a le seti.
translatorInputs.caption: Talosaga a le tagata faaliliu sao

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} vaega — o le alamanuia / vaega / tone knob. Fa'alauiloaina e pei o {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} po o {html}. Fa'aaoga {html} pe a fai o au punaoa taua o ni vaega HTML moni.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, po'o le {deleted}. Fa'atonutonu pe fa'afefea ona fa'asalalau upu masoa i fa'aliliuga.
items.profanityMarker: {asterisk} po o {tag}. E na o le taua pe a {profanityAction} {marked}.
items.allowFallback: Pe a {false}, e toe faafoi mai e le Faaliliu se mea sese nai lo le toe pa'u i tua i le faiga lautele pe afai e leai se {categoryId} e faaaoga mo se nofoaga e taulai atu i ai.

resilienceInputs.heading: Puipuiga ma le puipuiga o le placeholder
resilienceInputs.intro: O nei sao e pulea ai le auala e amio ai le gaioiga pe a fa'aitiitia e le Fa'aliliu lau talosaga ma pe fa'afefea ona puipuia fa'ailoga e pei o le {mustache} po'o le {indexZero} mai le fa'aleagaina i le taimi o le fa'aliliuga.
resilienceInputs.caption: Resilience ma placeholder puipuiga sao

items.maxRetries: Fa'ateleina taumafaiga toe taumafai i luga o tali HTTP le tumau ({statusCodes}). O le aofa'i atoa o vala'au HTTP i le talosaga e {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Pulou (i milliseconds) i luga o so'o se moe e tasi. O le gaioiga e fa'aaloalo ai i le ulutala o le tali a le {retryAfter} a Azure pe a i ai; a leai, e fa'aaogaina le jittered exponential backoff fa'atapula'aina i lenei taua.
items.protectPlaceholders: A {true} (faaletonu), placeholders e pei o {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} ma HTML fa'alapotopotoga ua suia i sentinel fa'ailoga a'o le'i fa'aliliuina ma toe fa'afo'i mulimuli ane. Fa'aleaogaina pe a fai o lau punaoa o lo'o i ai ma le loto i ai ni tusiga moni e tatau ona fa'aliliuina.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Newline-vavae'ese regexes (e aunoa ma le fa'atapula'aina) fa'aopopo i le seti placeholder faaletonu, mo se fa'ata'ita'iga {angleToken} mo le syntax fa'ailoga masani.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Newline-vavae'ese glob mamanu fetaui ma parser-tulaga ki (JSON togitogi auala, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF iunite {xliffId}, INI / restext ki). O ki e fetaui e lafoina mai le talosaga a le Faaliliu ma pasi atu faatasi ai ma le faasaoina o lo latou taua o le punavai.

items.summaryTitle: Aotelega puupuu PR-ulutala-faauo, mo se faataitaiga {summaryExample}.
items.summaryDetails: Markdown aotelega talafeagai mo se PR tino po'o se aotelega o galuega.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} pe a faia se tasi pe sili atu faaliliuga fou.

formats.title: Fa'atulagaga o faila
formats.lede: Ono fa'ata'amilomiloina fa'ata'amilomiloina punaoa fa'ata'amilomilo. O le gaioiga e faitau ai faila punaoa ta'itasi, fa'aliliuina tulaga faatauaina, ma tusi se uso i le nofoaga fa'atatau.
formats.namingConvention: O fa'amaumauga uma e fa'aaoga ai le {namingConvention} fa'aigoaina o le tauaofiaga.

resx.blurb: XML-fa'avae .NET punaoa faila. Fa'aliliuina le tusiga i totonu o {dataValue} node ta'itasi, fa'asaoina fa'amatalaga ma metadata.

xliff.blurb: OASIS XLIFF 2.0 pepa aloaia Faaliliuina {source} taitasi ma tusi le taunuuga i le {target} talafeagai, faatulaga {trgLang} mo le nofoaga.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object files. Fa'aliliuina ta'itasi {msgid} / {msgidPlural} i {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural} fomu.

json.blurb: Faila JSON fa'afuase'i. O mea faitino nested ua flattened ma le {delimiter} delimiter mo le faaliliuga, ona toe nested lea i luga o galuega faatino. O ki togitogi ({dottedKey}) o lo'o fa'asaoina i upu pu'upu'u.

ini.blurb: Faigofie {keyValue} faila (Win32-style INI po'o so'o se config mafolafola). O ulutala o vaega ma fa'amatalaga e fa'asaoina.

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI punaoa tusitusiga — mafolafola {keyValue} paga faaaogaina o se soa tusitusiga e {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Fa'amaoniga fa'ata'amilomilo
roundTrip.body: O le su'ega fa'ata'ita'iga e fa'amaonia ai le byte-for-byte round-tripping mo sui o fa'atulagaga uma. Afai o se fa'atulagaga quirk e malepe ai le taamilosaga i lau codebase, fa'amolemole fa'{issueLink} ma se fa'ata'ita'iga la'ititi.

recipes.title: Fua
recipes.lede: Fa'ata'ita'iga masani mo le lafoina o fa'aliliuga: monorepos, glossaries, vaega fa'apitoa, mago tamo'e, ma le fa'atonutonuina o leo.

pullRequest.heading: Tatala se talosaga toso pe a mae'a tamo'e ta'itasi

monorepo.heading: Monorepos: fa'aliliuga lautele i le afifi

glossary.heading: Glossary mo igoa fa'ailoga ma tuutuuga o oloa
glossary.intro: Tu'u se {configPath} i totonu o le repo:
glossary.body: O faaupuga glossary e fa'aaogaina {after} le fa'aliliuga, o lea o le masini-fa'aliliuina galuega faatino tausia lau fa'ailoga e sili ona e fiafia i ai tusa lava pe fesuia'i e le fa'ata'ita'iga mo se uiga tutusa.

customCategory.heading: Vaega o le Fa'aliliuga Fa'apitoa (alamanuia / vaega)
customCategory.body: A'oa'o se vaega o le Azure {customTranslatorLink} i luga o se corpus e pu'eina ai lau alamanuia vaogagana ma leo (fa'aletulafono, fa'afoma'i, maketiina, inisinia i totonu, ma isi) ma pasi lona ID e ala i le {categoryId}. O le leo sili lea ona malosi o lo'o ofoina mai e Azure.

tone.heading: Leo fa'atonutonu + fa'amalosia fallback
tone.body: Tu'ufa'atasia se {categoryId} Fa'aliliu Fa'aliliuga ma {profanityAction} ma {allowFallbackFalse} e fa'amalosia ai se leo faifai pea ma toilalo le fa'agaioiga pe a fai o le vaega filifilia e leai se fa'aaogaina mo se tasi o au nofoaga fa'amoemoe.

dryRun.heading: Fa'apipi'i le fa'amamaina a'o le'i fa'apipi'iina le fa'agaioiga
dryRun.body: O le gaioiga o lo'o fa'aalia pea le aotelega o galuega faatino ma se aotelega o laasaga, ae leai ni faila ua tusia. Tu'ufa'atasia ma {failOnErrorFalse} e fa'aalia ai mataupu uma o se lapataiga a'o e fa'ata'ita'ia.

faq.title: Fesili ma tali
faq.lede: Tali vave i fesili e masani ona tula'i mai pe a fa'aaogaina le gaioiga.

azure.heading: E fa'apefea ona talanoa le gaioiga ia Azure?
azure.body: E ala i le Microsoft aloaia {azureSdkLink} SDK, layered i luga o {corePipelineLink}. O lena mea e te maua ai otometi toe taumafai i luga o {statusCodes}, taina talosaga ma tali fa'ata'ita'iga, ma fa'amaoniga header fa'atautaia mo le leai o se totogi — mea uma sa masani ona avea ma lima-fa'asolosolo {axios} vala'au. O le laualuga o gaioiga lautele (inputs, outputs, faila outputs) e le suia.

tone.heading: Aisea e fa'aliliuina ai i nisi taimi e le fa'ailoga pe fa'aleagaina?
tone.body: O le fa'aliliuga o masini e fa'aletonu i se fa'ata'ita'iga lautele. Tolu knobs fesoasoani: o se {glossaryLink} mo faigata vaitaimi overrides, o se {customTranslatorLink} mo fa'ata'ita'iga lelei a'oa'oina i lou leo ma upu, ma {profanityAction} e fufulu pe fu'a upu masoa.

duplicateFiles.heading: E faapefea ona ou aloese mai le faaliliuina faalua o le faila lava lea e tasi?
duplicateFiles.body: Fa'aosoina le fa'agaioiga i luga o {paths} e fetaui ma na'o au punavai-lotoifale faila, mo se fa'ata'ita'iga, {sourceGlob}. O le gaioiga e aofia ai fo'i lana lava fa'amama faila pe a seti le {githubToken}, fa'aititia le galuega i faila i le lata mai tautinoga.

offline.heading: E mafai ona ou fa'atautaia le gaioiga offline?
offline.body: E le sa'o — Azure AI Translator o le fai'ai o le taimi tamo'e. Ae e mafai ona e tamo'e ma {dryRunTrue} e fa'amaonia ai le fa'ata'ita'iga ma le config e aunoa ma le faia o so'o se talosaga HTTP mo le fa'aliliuga.

node.heading: O le a le Node version e tamo'e ai le gaioiga?
node.body: v3 tamo'e i luga o le GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime} runtime. O le JavaScript e fetaui ma le Node 20, 22, ma le 24, o le mea lea e su'esu'eina e le CI.

dist.heading: O fea e sau ai le {distDir} afifiina?
dist.body: GitHub JS gaioiga lafoina a latou tu'ufa'atasia JS i le fale teu oloa. O le {distBuild} workflow e toe fausia pe a mae'a tu'ufa'atasia uma e {mainBranch} pe a tafetafea, ma poloka {distCheck} PRs o le a tulaueleele ai galuega tuai.

formats.heading: Ae fa'apefea isi fa'atulagaga o punaoa?
formats.body: Aso nei: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} pe afai e te mana'omia se isi — o le fa'ata'ita'iga o le fa'afanua e la'ititi (fa'ata'ita'i → fa'afanua → fa'aaoga fa'aliliuga → fa'atulagaga) ma saofaga e taliaina.

translations.title: Faaliliuga
translations.lede: O lenei itulau ua faaliliuina e le Resource Translator lava ia, i luga o tulei uma i le autu, i gagana uma e lagolagoina e le Azure AI Translator.
translations.statusPending: {translatedCount} o lo'o tu'uina atu nei — {pendingCount} fa'atali mo le isi {workflowName} tamo'e.
translations.viewWorkflowRuns: Va'ai i le fa'agaioiga o fa'a
translations.filterPlaceholder: Saili e ala i le gagana, code, po'o le igoa moni ...
translations.translationPending: Faaliliuga o loo faatalitali — tatala se {workflowName} tamo'e.
translations.noLocales: E leai ni nofoaga e tutusa ma lena faamama.

steps.source: O le faila faa-Peretania o loo ola i {messagesPath}.
steps.workflow: Tulei lena pa'i e kiki ese ai {workflowLink}, lea e tamo'e {thisAction} faasaga ia te ia lava.
steps.fanOut: O le gaioiga e fa'aalu i nofoaga uma e lagolagoina e le Azure AI Translator (fa'atulagaina i le {configPath}) ma tusi se {messagesLocaleJson} i le taula'iga.
steps.pullRequest: O lo'o fa'aauau pea ona fa'aliliuina se fa'aliliuga fou. O le tu'ufa'atasia o le a toe lolomiina ai lenei itulau ma fa'atumuina kata.

translations.poweredBy: Fa'amalosia e le Resource Translator ma le Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Saofaga
contributing.lede: Bug lipoti, foliga talosaga, ma toso talosaga e talia uma. O le gaioiga e la'ititi lava e fa'auo ai i tagata fai saofaga muamua.

steps.fixture: Fa'aopopo se fa'amau i lalo o le {testDataDir}.
steps.extension: Fa'aopopo le fa'aopoopoga o le faila i le {translationFileSchemes} i le {finderFile}.
steps.tests: Tusi ni suega faataamilo mo le faatulagaga → le faatulagaga ma le faaliliuga.

coverage.heading: Tapulaa o inisiua
coverage.body: O le Jest config e fa'amalosia ai le inisiua maualalo. O le tulafono fou e tatau ona tausia le fa'amatalaga + laina i luga atu o le 78% ma galuega i luga atu o le 90%. Fa'aopopo fa'ata'ita'iga ma su'ega fa'atasi ma lau suiga.

docsSite.heading: Nofoaga o faamaumauga
docsSite.body: O le {docsDir} folder o se Astro 6 + Tailwind v4 poloketi. Tamoe {npmInstall} iina i le taimi e tasi, ona {npmRunDev} lea mo le muai vaaiga i le lotoifale. O le {pagesWorkflow} workflow e lafoina pepa i GitHub Pages i luga o tu'ufa'atasia uma.

changelog.title: Suiga
changelog.lede: Aotelega maualuga o fa'asa'olotoga. O le canonical, fa'amaoni changelog o lo'o ola i CHANGELOG.md i totonu o le faleteuoloa.

items.newInputs: Fa'amatalaga fou: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, fa'atasi ai ma le alualu i luma Translator knobs {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, ma {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Source locale o lo'o tu'uina atu foi i le Fa'aliliu Upu ona o {fromLocale} o lea e le otometi ona iloa manoa pu'upu'u.
items.resilience: {label} otometi toe taumafai i luga o tali HTTP le tumau ({statusCodes}) e fa'aaloalo ai i le {retryAfter} header a Azure — e toe fo'i i tua i le jittered exponential backoff pe a toesea. E ala i {maxRetries} ma {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} fa'ailoga e pei o {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} ma HTML fa'alapotopotoga o lo'o afifi i sentinels a'o le'i fa'aliliuina ma toe fa'afo'i mulimuli ane, o lea e taofi ai e le Fa'aliliu le i18next / Mustache / Handlebars / .NET / printf placeholders. Toggle e ala i {protectPlaceholders}; Fa'alauteleina ma le {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} {noTranslatePatterns} sao fou e pa'u ai ki tutusa mai le talosaga a le Faaliliu upu atoa (faasaoina tulaga faatauaina punaoa mo igoa igoa, tulafono sese, ma isi). Fetaui glob mamanu faasaga parser-tulaga ki (JSON togitogi ala, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF iunite {xliffId}, INI / restext ki). {issue}
items.glossary: Lagolago glossary, aotelega o laasaga e ala i {coreSummary}.
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs site with view transitions and Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA pasi. Logo glyphs liua i auala ina ia latou le toe toilalo lanu-eseesega faasaga i gradient taofi, o le opeopea {backToTop} faamau faaaogaina {inert} ao natia (nai lo se {ariaHidden} toggle na tuua ai tabbable), {formatsAstro} vaega ua le toe feto'ai ma latou otometi-gaosia ulutala IDs, tolu pepa lotoifale nei faaalia BCP-47-aoga uiga {lang} ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), faaluaina {documentation} faailoga faailo ua disambiguated i le va o sidebar ma footer,  ma laulau uma o fa'amaumauga i luga o {inputs} / {configuration} va'a ma se fa'amatalaga fa'amaumauga.
items.inlineCode: {label} Docs prose {codeElement} o lo'o ofuina nei le mafanafana / amber theme accent — ese mai le brand→accent palette fa'aaogaina mo feso'ota'iga ma ulutala.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
